items.question: Which fashion stores offer the highest cashback?
items.answer: Cashback rates vary by store and season. Nike often offers 12%, ASOS up to 10%, and Nordstrom up to 8%. Check our store listings for current rates.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on sale or clearance items?
items.answer: Yes! Most stores offer cashback on sale and clearance items. However, check individual store terms as some exclusions may apply.

items.question: How long does fashion cashback take to confirm?
items.answer: Fashion cashback typically takes 30-60 days to confirm due to return periods. This protects against returns and exchanges.

items.question: What happens if I return an item?
items.answer: If you return an item, the cashback will be deducted from your account. Wait until after the return period to withdraw cashback.

items.question: Can I use coupons with cashback?
items.answer: Yes! In most cases, you can stack coupons and promo codes with cashback. Just make sure to click through our link first.

items.question: Do size exchanges affect my cashback?
items.answer: Exchanges for different sizes usually don't affect cashback as long as the order value remains the same. However, returns for refunds will reduce your cashback.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on gift card purchases?
items.answer: Most stores do not offer cashback on gift card purchases. Cashback is typically earned on merchandise only.

items.question: What about cashback on international shipping?
items.answer: Cashback is calculated on the total purchase amount including taxes. International shipping fees may or may not qualify - check store terms.

final.title: Start Saving on Fashion Today
